hero.wanderer.name: Wang Lin
home.path.title: My Path
home.path.empty: Your road has not yet begun. Clear a map to carve the first step.
home.profile.title: Character Profile
home.map_portal_hint: Inner Realm: chân tinh → star domain → Lôi Tiên Realm. Phong Giới seals the border — Outer Realm lies beyond.
home.journey_complete: Wang Lin's road through Chu Tước Star is complete. Revisit cleared chân tinh from the Star Domain Portal or walk Echoes of the Ancients.
home.breakthrough_ready: Your spirit is full — tap Cultivate to break through.
home.awakening_ready: {skill} is ready to awaken — open Skills to begin the ceremony.
home.echoes_travel_hint: Walk as legendary cultivators who already conquered the path — preview realms, skills, and fortune.
home.coming_soon: World map arrives in a future update.
home.dharma.empty: No Dharma Treasures yet. Defeat bosses, explore POIs, and survive ordeals to claim them.
home.dharma.slot_click_to_filter: Click to filter by this slot
home.dharma.intro: Dharma Treasures you have seized on the road — artifacts, treasures, and relics forged in cultivation.
home.divine.empty: No Divine Abilities yet. Walk the maps, seize fortuitous encounters, and choose what to carry forward.
home.divine.intro: Divine Abilities you have unlocked on the road — profound techniques from map ordeals and destiny.
home.intent.empty: No Intent awakened yet. Channel {intent} in combat to begin.
home.intent.intro: Core concepts you have comprehended on the cultivation road. Each Intent governs a category of Divine Abilities and unlocks profound power.
home.intent.semantics.empty: No Intent discovered yet. Channel sword, void, flame, thunder, time, or life in combat to begin.
home.story.empty: Venture forth to uncover the Dao.
dharma.name: Dharma Treasure
divine.name: Divine Ability
intent.name: Intent
intent.sword.desc: Sword Intent — cutting through illusion to see truth.
intent.void.desc: Void Intent — tearing between existence and nothingness.
intent.time.desc: Time Intent — bending the flow of combat.
intent.life.desc: Life Intent — circulating vitality to endure.
item.sword.wood.name: Wood Sword
item.sword.wood.desc: A humble training blade carved from spirit oak.
item.sword.iron.name: Iron Sword
item.sword.iron.desc: Forged iron with a steady edge for wandering cultivators.
item.robe.novice.name: Novice Robe
item.robe.novice.desc: Simple cloth robes worn by sect initiates.
item.bracelet.copper.name: Copper Bracelet
item.bracelet.copper.desc: A copper band etched with faint protective runes.
item.ring.speed.name: Swift Ring
item.ring.speed.desc: Lightens the step of those who chase the wind.
item.spirit.jade.name: Jade Spirit Orb
item.spirit.jade.desc: A jade orb that resonates with inner spirit.
item.consumable.immortal_jade.name: Immortal Jade
item.consumable.immortal_jade.desc: Precious cultivation jade consumed at realm breakthrough. Gather from bosses and fortuitous encounters.
skill.sword.slash.name: Heaven Reverse Slash
skill.sword.slash.desc: A swift arcing strike — foundation sword art after Wang Lin claims the Heaven Reverse Sword.
skill.void.slash.name: Void Slash
skill.void.slash.desc: Tears a void rift — reverse-heaven technique Wang Lin learns on Chu Tước Star.
skill.flame.bolt.name: Flame Bolt Art
skill.flame.bolt.desc: Launches a searing bolt — fire art from Fire Burn Country demonic cultivators.
skill.lightning.strike.name: Heavenly Thunder Strike
skill.lightning.strike.desc: Calls heavenly thunder — first lightning art on the tribulation pass.
skill.time.slow.name: Time Art
skill.time.slow.desc: Bends time around foes — rare technique on La Thiên Star Domain.
skill.life.mend.name: Spirit Mend Art
skill.life.mend.desc: Draws life qi inward — survival on the cultivation road.
skill.sword.slash.awakened.name: Heaven Reverse Flash
skill.sword.slash.awakened.desc: Awakened Heaven Reverse intent — a blinding flash before Wang Lin.
skill.void.slash.awakened.name: Void Fracture
skill.void.slash.awakened.desc: Wang Lin fractures space — void collapses in a devastating wave.
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.name: Twin Flame Lotus
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.desc: Twin flames detonate across Fire Burn sands — art before heavenly tribulation.
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.name: Thunder Chain
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.desc: Lightning chains between foes after tribulation — Wang Lin swallows thunder into his meridians.
skill.time.slow.awakened.name: Time Domain
skill.time.slow.awakened.desc: A domain only Wang Lin moves freely in — mastered in the Ice Palace.
skill.life.mend.awakened.desc: Spirit mend — a surge of life qi that floods the body with vitality.
skill.life.mend.awakened.name: Spirit Mend
skill.basic.meditate.name: Gather Qi
skill.basic.meditate.desc: Sit still and draw qi inward — fastest health recovery. Ends when you move, attack, or take a hit.
skill.basic.meditate.lore: Every cultivator learns to rest the body so spirit can return — the first step on the long road.
skill.detail.unlock_base: Taught when you first channel {intent} intent — every cultivator learns this form.
skill.detail.unlock_awakened: Awakening ceremony at {realm} — {uses} uses and {xp} insight to ignite the true art.
skill.sword.slash.lore: First sword form Wang Lin drills after claiming Heaven Reverse on Ghost Spirit Mountain. Simple, fast — seed of every combo.
skill.sword.slash.awakened.lore: When Heaven Reverse intent awakens, the blade decides what may exist on Chu Tước Star.
skill.void.slash.lore: Reverse-heaven void art — Wang Lin tears a thin rift between being and nothing.
skill.void.slash.awakened.lore: Wang Lin fractures space at the inner demon pass before Lôi Tiên Gate. Void Fracture pulls enemies into annihilation.
skill.flame.bolt.lore: Fire bolt art from Fire Burn demonic cultivators — ranged art Wang Lin seizes on La Thiên Star Domain.
skill.flame.bolt.awakened.lore: Twin flames mirror across Fire Burn sands — art before heavenly tribulation.
skill.lightning.strike.lore: Heavenly thunder on the tribulation pass — a piercing line for those who reverse heaven.
skill.lightning.strike.awakened.lore: Lightning chains after tribulation. Wang Lin swallows thunder into his meridians.
skill.time.slow.lore: Rare time art on La Thiên — Wang Lin bends combat rhythm, foes stumble.
skill.time.slow.awakened.lore: A domain only Wang Lin moves freely in at the Ice Palace. Others freeze like amber.
skill.life.mend.lore: Spirit mend — Wang Lin learns to survive when no one believed his roots were worthy.
skill.life.mend.awakened.lore: Life qi floods meridians — strong enough to reverse mortal wounds on the Lôi Tiên pass.
home.skills.intro: Techniques you have earned on the road — maps, ordeals, and cơ duyên.
home.skills.empty: No techniques yet. Walk the maps, seize fortuitous encounters, and choose what to carry forward.
home.settings.title: Settings
home.settings.reset_confirm: This will erase all journey progress — maps, items, realm, and story. Your language, performance, and volume settings are kept. This cannot be undone.
awakening.title: Insight Awakened
combat.skills.pick_hint: Only skills not on other buttons — no duplicates.
combat.skills.swap_hint: Tap a slot, then pick a skill. Hold skill buttons in combat to channel repeatedly.
combat.health.aria: Gather Qi — sit and recover health
destiny.prompt: Destiny bends — cơ duyên whispers. Choose your path carefully.
destiny.intro: Destiny points you earned on the road. Spend them on Dharma Treasures, Divine Abilities, or Intent.
destiny.empty: No unspent destiny points. Level up or seize fortuitous encounters to earn more.
destiny.option.dharma.label: Dharma Treasures
destiny.option.dharma.desc: Claim an item, gold, or artifact for your arsenal.
destiny.option.divine.label: Divine Abilities
destiny.option.divine.desc: Learn a new technique for your skill loadout.
destiny.option.intent.label: Intent
destiny.spend.dharma.desc: Invest in your arsenal and treasures.
destiny.spend.divine.desc: Commit to mastering a new art.
destiny.spend.intent.desc: Deepen your comprehension of an Intent.
